title: Frag Gap
excerpt: Fraggap (CVE-2026-53362) is a bug in the Linux UDPv6 corking path that allows a 15-byte OOB write into skb_shared_info. The code is here. {.markdown-image-centered} CONFIG_IPV6=y...
content_html:
Abstract

Fraggap (CVE-2026-53362) is a bug in the Linux UDPv6 corking path that allows a 15-byte OOB write into skb_shared_info. The code is here.

Vulnerability Summary

CONFIG_IPV6=y is required.

  1. Two splice() calls overwrite the first 15 bytes of skb_shared_info behind a new skb.
  2. The OOB write makes a leftover pipe address on the heap act as frags[0] and then triggers put_page() to create a dangling pipe page.
  3. That page is reclaimed as a PTE page so physical memory can be read and written.
  4. It rewrites core_pattern to run a root helper.

The faulty accounting came in with commit 773ba4fe9104. The current MSG_SPLICE_PAGES trigger became reachable after commit ce650a166335. The IPv6 path was fixed in commit 736b380e28d0.

Vulnerability Analysis

Overview

UDP corking collects several sends into one datagram. A datagram can cross a fragment boundary. Then __ip6_append_data() counts the bytes past the boundary in the previous skb as fraggap and moves them into the linear area of the next skb. The basic skb looks like the following.

fraggap is data that will be copied into the linear area. So it must be part of the new skb linear allocation and must be excluded from the length left on the pipe page. The vulnerable code does the opposite. It removes fraggap from the linear data area and puts it into pagedlen.

The kernel copies the fraggap bytes into the linear tail without reserving space in the data area. This lets us set the skb_shared_info right behind the tail to any 15 bytes. Setting only the single nr_frags byte to 1 makes the out-of-range frags[0] treat a leftover pipe page address on the heap as an allocated address.

Root cause

This bug happens because the same bytes are counted differently depending on the path. Building datalen includes fraggap as data the next skb must handle. The paged branch instead treats the same fraggap as part of external data.

datalen = length + fraggap;
fraglen = datalen + fragheaderlen;
pagedlen = 0;

/* ... */

else {
    alloclen = fragheaderlen + transhdrlen;
    pagedlen = datalen - transhdrlen;
}

/* ... */

copy = datalen - transhdrlen - fraggap - pagedlen;
if (copy < 0 && !(flags & MSG_SPLICE_PAGES)) {
    err = -EINVAL;
    goto error;
}

datalen adds fraggap but alloclen does not. pagedlen is derived from datalen so it also includes the gap. This shrinks copy to -fraggap. The negative-copy check is skipped when MSG_SPLICE_PAGES is set.

After that the code ignores that fraggap is non-linear data and does a real linear copy.

data = skb_put(skb, fraglen - pagedlen);
data += fragheaderlen;

if (fraggap) {
    skb->csum = skb_copy_and_csum_bits(
        skb_prev, maxfraglen,
        data + transhdrlen, fraggap);
    /* ... */
}

In the end the paged branch copies the gap content without making room for it.

Triggering the 15-byte OOB

The goal is to make the first skb exactly 15 bytes larger than the fragment boundary. The linear tail of the next skb then lands on the start of skb_shared_info.

  1. A UDPv6 loopback socket with a 320-byte routing header and MTU 1287
  2. A 919-byte pipe payload that makes the first skb 15 bytes larger than the fragment boundary
  3. A second 20-byte pipe payload appended to the same cork queue

A splice() from a pipe into a socket makes splice_to_socket() build a bvec iterator and set MSG_SPLICE_PAGES. SPLICE_F_MORE becomes MSG_MORE. With UDP_CORK this keeps the first skb in the write queue instead of sending it.

msg.msg_flags = MSG_SPLICE_PAGES;
if (flags & SPLICE_F_MORE)
    msg.msg_flags |= MSG_MORE;

/* ... */

iov_iter_bvec(&msg.msg_iter, ITER_SOURCE, bvec, bc,
               len - remain);
ret = sock_sendmsg(sock, &msg);

The call chain is udpv6_sendmsg() → ip6_append_data() → __ip6_append_data() → skb_splice_from_iter(). Plain UDP is used so udpv6_sendmsg() picks ip_generic_getfrag. __ip6_append_data() keeps the page-splice path and sets paged = true. This reaches the vulnerable path that attaches the payload as an skb fragment.

The actual sequence is as follows.

  1. The first splice(919, SPLICE_F_MORE) appends length = 927 after adding the 8-byte UDP header. The 320-byte routing header makes fragheaderlen 360. The first skb length becomes exactly 1287.
  2. UDP_CORK keeps the skb in the queue. The computed fragment boundary is 1272 so the last 15 bytes of the skb tail must move to the next fragment.
  3. The second splice(20, SPLICE_F_MORE) finds the tail skb in the same queue. The first copy is 0 and smaller than the new length 20 so it is recomputed against the boundary as copy = -15. This value enters alloc_new_skb and creates a new skb with fraggap = 15.

The needed calculations are below.

fragheaderlen = 40 + 320 = 360
maxfraglen    = ((1287 - 360) & ~7) + 360 - 8 = 1272
first skb len = 360 + 8 + 919 = 1287
fraggap       = 1287 - 1272 = 15

second append: length=20, transhdrlen=0
datalen=35, alloclen=360, pagedlen=35, copy=-15

Adding the 16-byte loopback headroom and the 8-byte fragment-header reserve makes the alloc_skb() request 384. On lts-6.12.85 this request uses a 704-byte skbuff_small_head object. The first 384 bytes are the skb data area and the last 320 bytes are skb_shared_info.

skb_put(360) moves the tail exactly to skb->end and the following data += fragheaderlen points to the same address. So the last 15 bytes of the previous skb are copied into skb_shared_info + 0x00 through +0x0e. This lets us write the 15 bytes we want into skb_shared_info.

Primitive to Exploit

We can now write 15 bytes at the start of skb_shared_info. The first skb holds 1272 - 360 - 8 = 904 payload bytes before the boundary. So source payload [904..918] maps to destination [+0x00..+0x0e].

nr_frags sits at skb_shared_info + 0x02. So the exploit sets only source byte 906 to 1 and leaves the rest at 0.

nr_frags is at offset 0x02 and frags[0] is at 0x30. The whole skb_shared_info is 320 bytes. The full pahole output is in the Appendix.

With only 15 bytes we can control little more than a flag. So the only useful field is nr_frags. The frags[0] that will hold the real page descriptor is outside the OOB range. How do we solve this?

Solving the problems below gives root.

  • Write a valid pipe-page descriptor into frags[0]
  • Turn the freed page into a core_pattern overwrite

Exploit Details

Exploit Summary

  • Reuse Uninitialized Variable → free an object that held a valid skb_frag_t then reallocate it as the vulnerable skb to reuse the uninitialized frags[0]
  • Fraggap OOB → flip nr_frags from 0 to 1 so frags[0] is treated as allocated
  • Append Pipe → attach the second pipe page to slot 1 so nr_frags == 2
  • Unmatched Page Free → the destructor runs put_page() on frags[0]
  • Dirty Pagetable → reallocate the dangling page as a PTE page
  • Physical write → change the PTE to find and overwrite core_pattern and run a root helper

Background of the exploit

Why stale frags[] survives?

Allocating a new skb head does not clear all of skb_shared_info. __finalize_skb_around() zeroes only up to dataref.

shinfo = skb_shinfo(skb);
memset(shinfo, 0, offsetof(struct skb_shared_info, dataref));
atomic_set(&shinfo->dataref, 1);

frags[] sits after dataref so descriptor bytes from the previous allocation can survive. But nr_frags is reset to 0 so the stale descriptor is normally unreachable. Setting nr_frags to 1 with the Fraggap OOB makes the kernel treat that page as allocated.

Dirty Pagetable

A page table is a 4 KiB page from the page allocator. Overlapping the dangling pipe page with a PTE page lets a pipe write corrupt the PTE. Changing only the PFN of the PTE maps the physical page we want into userspace.

Planting a stale frags[0]

For now the only field we control is nr_frags and the frags[0] we need is outside the OOB range. So before triggering the bug the exploit builds a valid descriptor in the same cache and reclaims an object where those bytes remain.

First it writes a 256-byte marker into the source pipe wp. Then it tee()s into 8 holding pipes to raise the page refcount to 9. These extra references keep the source page alive during grooming and triggering.

The descriptors are built in a single corked datagram. All paged payload comes from the same source page through tee(). So each target head gets a valid descriptor and a valid page reference in frags[0].

The trigger socket and the two pipe payloads are prepared before the groom socket is closed. Then the two splices run with no other allocation in between. The first trigger skb has a 392 request so it uses kmalloc-1k and does not touch the small-head freelist. Only the second 384 request reuses one of the just-freed targets.

The reused object now holds source-page descriptor bytes in frags[0] but stays harmless while nr_frags == 0. The next stage uses the OOB to activate this stale slot.

From nr_frags to a dangling page

Once the Fraggap OOB sets nr_frags = 1 the destructor treats frags[0] as a real fragment. The second splice queues the new skb. Then the next loop iteration attaches the remaining 20 valid bytes to the same skb.

skb_append_pagefrags() uses the current nr_frags as the index of the new descriptor.

int i = skb_shinfo(skb)->nr_frags;

if (skb_can_coalesce(skb, i, page, offset)) {
    skb_frag_size_add(&skb_shinfo(skb)->frags[i - 1], size);
} else if (i < max_frags) {
    get_page(page);
    skb_fill_page_desc_noacc(skb, i, page, offset, size);
}

The index is already 1. The second trigger pipe page differs from the source wp page so it does not coalesce with frags[0] and goes into frags[1]. This path runs a normal get_page() and raises nr_frags to 2.

Closing the socket flushes the cork queue and the skb destructor releases both slots.

for (i = 0; i < shinfo->nr_frags; i++)
    __skb_frag_unref(&shinfo->frags[i], skb->pp_recycle);

So put_page() on frags[0] runs and drops the refcount. Closing the pipe last leaves a dangling page.

Reclaiming as a PTE

There is now a 4 KiB page that returned to the allocator but is still pointed to by wp->pipe_buffer. Calling mmap() and then touching it to create a PTE page reclaims the freed page.

Now any physical page can be read and written from userspace.

Finding and overwriting core_pattern

With physical read and write from PTE control we search for core_pattern.

Once we find it we change the value as below. When a child then raises SIGSEGV the kernel runs the command below as root.

|/proc/%P/fd/666 %P

Flag

Appendix

Verified skb_shared_info layout

struct skb_shared_info {
	__u8                       flags;                /*     0   0x1 */
	__u8                       meta_len;             /*   0x1   0x1 */
	__u8                       nr_frags;             /*   0x2   0x1 */
	__u8                       tx_flags;             /*   0x3   0x1 */
	short unsigned int         gso_size;             /*   0x4   0x2 */
	short unsigned int         gso_segs;             /*   0x6   0x2 */
	struct sk_buff *           frag_list;            /*   0x8   0x8 */
	union {
		struct skb_shared_hwtstamps hwtstamps;   /*  0x10   0x8 */
		struct xsk_tx_metadata_compl xsk_meta;   /*  0x10   0x8 */
	};                                               /*  0x10   0x8 */
	unsigned int               gso_type;             /*  0x18   0x4 */
	u32                        tskey;                /*  0x1c   0x4 */
	atomic_t                   dataref;              /*  0x20   0x4 */
	unsigned int               xdp_frags_size;       /*  0x24   0x4 */
	void *                     destructor_arg;       /*  0x28   0x8 */
	skb_frag_t                 frags[17];            /*  0x30 0x110 */

	/* size: 320, cachelines: 5, members: 14 */
};

Mitigation

The patch

The patch restores the invariant described above. It adds the fraggap that is really copied into the linear area and subtracts the same value on the non-linear side.

- alloclen = fragheaderlen + transhdrlen;
- pagedlen = datalen - transhdrlen;
+ alloclen = fragheaderlen + transhdrlen + fraggap;
+ pagedlen = datalen - transhdrlen - fraggap;

The IPv6 fix also removes the MSG_SPLICE_PAGES exception from the negative copy check. The IPv4 path had the same accounting bug and was fixed in commit eca856950f7c.

Partial mitigations

Restricting splice() works but it is not a good option.

Timeline

DateEvent
2022-07-12The bug was introduced in commit 773ba4fe9104.
2023-08-02The current MSG_SPLICE_PAGES corruption became possible after commit ce650a166335.
2026-05-15We reported the vulnerability privately to security@kernel.org.
2026-06-21The IPv6 fix 736b380e28d0 landed in the netdev net tree.
2026-06-25The fix was merged into Linux mainline.
2026-07-04The Linux kernel CNA published CVE-2026-53362.
2026-07-14We notified the Openwall linux-distros list.
2026-07-16The Linux kernel CNA published CVE-2026-53366.
2026-07-20We published the writeup and exploit.

Acknowledgements

Fraggap was found in IPv4/IPv6 by @physicube and @qwerty and used in kernelCTF. We thank Sultan Alsawaf (team CIQ) for confirming that the IPv4 bug is exploitable.

sentences.en: The OOB write makes a leftover pipe address on the heap act as frags[0] and then triggers put_page() to create a dangling pipe page.
sentences.zh: OOB 写入使堆上剩余的管道地址充当 frags[0]，然后触发 put_page() 创建悬空管道页。

blocks.html_en: • That page is reclaimed as a PTE page so physical memory can be read and written.

sentences.en: That page is reclaimed as a PTE page so physical memory can be read and written.
sentences.zh: 该页面被回收为 PTE 页面，以便可以读取和写入物理内存。

blocks.html_en: • It rewrites core_pattern to run a root helper.

sentences.en: It rewrites core_pattern to run a root helper.
sentences.zh: 它重写 core_pattern 来运行根助手。

blocks.html_en: The faulty accounting came in with commit 773ba4fe9104. The current MSG_SPLICE_PAGES trigger became reachable after commit ce650a166335. The IPv6 path was fixed in commit 736b380e28d0.

sentences.en: The faulty accounting came in with commit 773ba4fe9104.
sentences.zh: 错误的会计记录伴随着提交 773ba4fe9104。

sentences.en: The current MSG_SPLICE_PAGES trigger became reachable after commit ce650a166335.
sentences.zh: 当前的 MSG_SPLICE_PAGES 触发器在提交 ce650a166335 后变得可访问。

sentences.en: The IPv6 path was fixed in commit 736b380e28d0.
sentences.zh: IPv6 路径已在提交 736b380e28d0 中修复。

blocks.html_en: Vulnerability Analysis

sentences.en: Vulnerability Analysis
sentences.zh: 漏洞分析

blocks.html_en: Overview

sentences.en: Overview
sentences.zh: 概述

blocks.html_en: UDP corking collects several sends into one datagram. A datagram can cross a fragment boundary. Then __ip6_append_data() counts the bytes past the boundary in the previous skb as fraggap and moves them into the linear area of the next skb. The basic skb looks like the following.

sentences.en: UDP corking collects several sends into one datagram.
sentences.zh: UDP corking 将多个发送收集到一个数据报中。

sentences.en: A datagram can cross a fragment boundary.
sentences.zh: 数据报可以跨越片段边界。

sentences.en: Then __ip6_append_data() counts the bytes past the boundary in the previous skb as fraggap and moves them into the linear area of the next skb.
sentences.zh: 然后 __ip6_append_data() 将前一个 skb 中超出边界的字节计数为 fraggap，并将它们移动到下一个 skb 的线性区域中。

sentences.en: The basic skb looks like the following.
sentences.zh: 基本的 skb 如下所示。

blocks.html_en: fraggap is data that will be copied into the linear area. So it must be part of the new skb linear allocation and must be excluded from the length left on the pipe page. The vulnerable code does the opposite. It removes fraggap from the linear data area and puts it into pagedlen.

sentences.en: fraggap is data that will be copied into the linear area.
sentences.zh: fraggap 是将复制到线性区域的数据。

sentences.en: So it must be part of the new skb linear allocation and must be excluded from the length left on the pipe page.
sentences.zh: 因此它必须是新的 skb 线性分配的一部分，并且必须从管道页上剩余的长度中排除。

sentences.en: The vulnerable code does the opposite.
sentences.zh: 易受攻击的代码则执行相反的操作。

sentences.en: It removes fraggap from the linear data area and puts it into pagedlen.
sentences.zh: 它从线性数据区域中删除fraggap并将其放入pagedlen中。

blocks.html_en: The kernel copies the fraggap bytes into the linear tail without reserving space in the data area. This lets us set the skb_shared_info right behind the tail to any 15 bytes. Setting only the single nr_frags byte to 1 makes the out-of-range frags[0] treat a leftover pipe page address on the heap as an allocated address.

sentences.en: The kernel copies the fraggap bytes into the linear tail without reserving space in the data area.
sentences.zh: 内核将碎片间隙字节复制到线性尾部，而不在数据区域中保留空间。

sentences.en: This lets us set the skb_shared_info right behind the tail to any 15 bytes.
sentences.zh: 这让我们可以将尾部后面的 skb_shared_info 设置为任意 15 个字节。

sentences.en: Setting only the single nr_frags byte to 1 makes the out-of-range frags[0] treat a leftover pipe page address on the heap as an allocated address.
sentences.zh: 仅将单个 nr_frags 字节设置为 1 会使超出范围的 frags[0] 将堆上剩余的管道页地址视为已分配的地址。

blocks.html_en: Root cause

sentences.en: Root cause
sentences.zh: 根本原因

blocks.html_en: This bug happens because the same bytes are counted differently depending on the path. Building datalen includes fraggap as data the next skb must handle. The paged branch instead treats the same fraggap as part of external data.

sentences.en: This bug happens because the same bytes are counted differently depending on the path.
sentences.zh: 发生此错误的原因是，根据路径不同，相同字节的计数方式也不同。

sentences.en: Building datalen includes fraggap as data the next skb must handle.
sentences.zh: 构建 datalen 包括 fraggap 作为下一个 skb 必须处理的数据。

sentences.en: The paged branch instead treats the same fraggap as part of external data.
sentences.zh: 相反，分页分支将相同的碎片视为外部数据的一部分。

blocks.html_en: datalen adds fraggap but alloclen does not. pagedlen is derived from datalen so it also includes the gap. This shrinks copy to -fraggap. The negative-copy check is skipped when MSG_SPLICE_PAGES is set.

sentences.en: datalen adds fraggap but alloclen does not.
sentences.zh: datalen 添加了fraggap，但alloclen 没有。

sentences.en: pagedlen is derived from datalen so it also includes the gap.
sentences.zh: pagedlen 源自 datalen，因此它也包含间隙。

sentences.en: This shrinks copy to -fraggap.
sentences.zh: 这会将副本缩小为 -fragap。

sentences.en: The negative-copy check is skipped when MSG_SPLICE_PAGES is set.
sentences.zh: 当 MSG_SPLICE_PAGES 设置时，将跳过负拷贝检查。

blocks.html_en: After that the code ignores that fraggap is non-linear data and does a real linear copy.

sentences.en: After that the code ignores that fraggap is non-linear data and does a real linear copy.
sentences.zh: 之后，代码会忽略 fraggap 是非线性数据并进行真正的线性复制。

blocks.html_en: In the end the paged branch copies the gap content without making room for it.

sentences.en: In the end the paged branch copies the gap content without making room for it.
sentences.zh: 最后，分页分支复制了间隙内容，但没有为其腾出空间。

blocks.html_en: Triggering the 15-byte OOB

sentences.en: Triggering the 15-byte OOB
sentences.zh: 触发 15 字节 OOB

blocks.html_en: The goal is to make the first skb exactly 15 bytes larger than the fragment boundary. The linear tail of the next skb then lands on the start of skb_shared_info.

sentences.en: The goal is to make the first skb exactly 15 bytes larger than the fragment boundary.
sentences.zh: 目标是使第一个 skb 比片段边界大 15 个字节。

sentences.en: The linear tail of the next skb then lands on the start of skb_shared_info.
sentences.zh: 然后下一个 skb 的线性尾部落在 skb_shared_info 的开头。

blocks.html_en: • A UDPv6 loopback socket with a 320-byte routing header and MTU 1287

sentences.en: A UDPv6 loopback socket with a 320-byte routing header and MTU 1287
sentences.zh: 具有 320 字节路由标头和 MTU 1287 的 UDPv6 环回套接字

blocks.html_en: • A 919-byte pipe payload that makes the first skb 15 bytes larger than the fragment boundary

sentences.en: A 919-byte pipe payload that makes the first skb 15 bytes larger than the fragment boundary
sentences.zh: 919 字节的管道有效负载，使第一个 skb 比片段边界大 15 字节

blocks.html_en: • A second 20-byte pipe payload appended to the same cork queue

sentences.en: A second 20-byte pipe payload appended to the same cork queue
sentences.zh: 第二个 20 字节管道有效负载附加到同一个 cork 队列

blocks.html_en: A splice() from a pipe into a socket makes splice_to_socket() build a bvec iterator and set MSG_SPLICE_PAGES. SPLICE_F_MORE becomes MSG_MORE. With UDP_CORK this keeps the first skb in the write queue instead of sending it.

sentences.en: A splice() from a pipe into a socket makes splice_to_socket() build a bvec iterator and set MSG_SPLICE_PAGES.
sentences.zh: 从管道到套接字的 splice() 使 splice_to_socket() 构建一个 bvec 迭代器并设置 MSG_SPLICE_PAGES。

sentences.en: SPLICE_F_MORE becomes MSG_MORE.
sentences.zh: SPLICE_F_MORE 变为 MSG_MORE。

sentences.en: With UDP_CORK this keeps the first skb in the write queue instead of sending it.
sentences.zh: 使用 UDP_CORK，这会将第一个 skb 保留在写入队列中，而不是发送它。

blocks.html_en: The call chain is udpv6_sendmsg() → ip6_append_data() → __ip6_append_data() → skb_splice_from_iter(). Plain UDP is used so udpv6_sendmsg() picks ip_generic_getfrag. __ip6_append_data() keeps the page-splice path and sets paged = true. This reaches the vulnerable path that attaches the payload as an skb fragment.

sentences.en: The call chain is udpv6_sendmsg() → ip6_append_data() → __ip6_append_data() → skb_splice_from_iter().
sentences.zh: 调用链为udpv6_sendmsg() → ip6_append_data() → __ip6_append_data() → skb_splice_from_iter()。

sentences.en: Plain UDP is used so udpv6_sendmsg() picks ip_generic_getfrag. __ip6_append_data() keeps the page-splice path and sets paged = true.
sentences.zh: 使用普通 UDP，因此 udpv6_sendmsg() 选择 ip_generic_getfrag。 __ip6_append_data() 保留页面拼接路径并设置 paged = true。

sentences.en: This reaches the vulnerable path that attaches the payload as an skb fragment.
sentences.zh: 这到达了将有效负载作为 skb 片段附加的易受攻击的路径。

blocks.html_en: The actual sequence is as follows.

sentences.en: The actual sequence is as follows.
sentences.zh: 实际的顺序如下。

blocks.html_en: • The first splice(919, SPLICE_F_MORE) appends length = 927 after adding the 8-byte UDP header. The 320-byte routing header makes fragheaderlen 360. The first skb length becomes exactly 1287.

sentences.en: The first splice(919, SPLICE_F_MORE) appends length = 927 after adding the 8-byte UDP header.
sentences.zh: 第一个 splice(919, SPLICE_F_MORE) 在添加 8 字节 UDP 标头后附加 length = 927。

sentences.en: The 320-byte routing header makes fragheaderlen 360.
sentences.zh: 320 字节的路由标头使 fragheaderlen 为 360。

sentences.en: The first skb length becomes exactly 1287.
sentences.zh: 第一个 skb 长度恰好变为 1287。

blocks.html_en: • UDP_CORK keeps the skb in the queue. The computed fragment boundary is 1272 so the last 15 bytes of the skb tail must move to the next fragment.

sentences.en: UDP_CORK keeps the skb in the queue.
sentences.zh: UDP_CORK 将 skb 保留在队列中。

sentences.en: The computed fragment boundary is 1272 so the last 15 bytes of the skb tail must move to the next fragment.
sentences.zh: 计算出的片段边界为 1272，因此 skb 尾部的最后 15 个字节必须移动到下一个片段。

blocks.html_en: • The second splice(20, SPLICE_F_MORE) finds the tail skb in the same queue. The first copy is 0 and smaller than the new length 20 so it is recomputed against the boundary as copy = -15. This value enters alloc_new_skb and creates a new skb with fraggap = 15.

sentences.en: The second splice(20, SPLICE_F_MORE) finds the tail skb in the same queue.
sentences.zh: 第二个 splice(20, SPLICE_F_MORE) 在同一队列中找到尾部 skb。

sentences.en: The first copy is 0 and smaller than the new length 20 so it is recomputed against the boundary as copy = -15.
sentences.zh: 第一个副本为 0 并且小于新长度 20，因此根据边界重新计算它为 copy = -15。

sentences.en: This value enters alloc_new_skb and creates a new skb with fraggap = 15.
sentences.zh: 该值进入alloc_new_skb并创建一个fraggap = 15的新skb。

blocks.html_en: The needed calculations are below.

sentences.en: The needed calculations are below.
sentences.zh: 所需的计算如下。

blocks.html_en: Adding the 16-byte loopback headroom and the 8-byte fragment-header reserve makes the alloc_skb() request 384. On lts-6.12.85 this request uses a 704-byte skbuff_small_head object. The first 384 bytes are the skb data area and the last 320 bytes are skb_shared_info.

sentences.en: Adding the 16-byte loopback headroom and the 8-byte fragment-header reserve makes the alloc_skb() request 384.
sentences.zh: 添加 16 字节环回余量和 8 字节片段标头保留使得 alloc_skb() 请求为 384。

sentences.en: On lts-6.12.85 this request uses a 704-byte skbuff_small_head object.
sentences.zh: 在 lts-6.12.85 上，此请求使用 704 字节的 skbuff_small_head 对象。

sentences.en: The first 384 bytes are the skb data area and the last 320 bytes are skb_shared_info.
sentences.zh: 前384字节是skb数据区，后320字节是skb_shared_info。

blocks.html_en: skb_put(360) moves the tail exactly to skb->end and the following data += fragheaderlen points to the same address. So the last 15 bytes of the previous skb are copied into skb_shared_info + 0x00 through +0x0e. This lets us write the 15 bytes we want into skb_shared_info.

sentences.en: skb_put(360) moves the tail exactly to skb->end and the following data += fragheaderlen points to the same address.
sentences.zh: skb_put(360) 将尾部精确移动到 skb->end 并且后面的 data += fragheaderlen 指向相同的地址。

sentences.en: So the last 15 bytes of the previous skb are copied into skb_shared_info + 0x00 through +0x0e.
sentences.zh: 因此，前一个 skb 的最后 15 个字节被复制到 skb_shared_info + 0x00 到 +0x0e 中。

sentences.en: This lets us write the 15 bytes we want into skb_shared_info.
sentences.zh: 这让我们可以将想要的 15 个字节写入 skb_shared_info。

blocks.html_en: Primitive to Exploit

sentences.en: Primitive to Exploit
sentences.zh: 原始的利用

blocks.html_en: We can now write 15 bytes at the start of skb_shared_info. The first skb holds 1272 - 360 - 8 = 904 payload bytes before the boundary. So source payload [904..918] maps to destination [+0x00..+0x0e].

sentences.en: We can now write 15 bytes at the start of skb_shared_info.
sentences.zh: 我们现在可以在 skb_shared_info 的开头写入 15 个字节。

sentences.en: The first skb holds 1272 - 360 - 8 = 904 payload bytes before the boundary.
sentences.zh: 第一个 skb 在边界之前保存 1272 - 360 - 8 = 904 个有效负载字节。

sentences.en: So source payload [904..918] maps to destination [+0x00..+0x0e].
sentences.zh: 因此源有效负载 [904..918] 映射到目标 [+0x00..+0x0e]。

blocks.html_en: nr_frags sits at skb_shared_info + 0x02. So the exploit sets only source byte 906 to 1 and leaves the rest at 0.

sentences.en: nr_frags sits at skb_shared_info + 0x02.
sentences.zh: nr_frags 位于 skb_shared_info + 0x02。

sentences.en: So the exploit sets only source byte 906 to 1 and leaves the rest at 0.
sentences.zh: 因此，该漏洞仅将源字节 906 设置为 1，其余部分设置为 0。

blocks.html_en: nr_frags is at offset 0x02 and frags[0] is at 0x30. The whole skb_shared_info is 320 bytes. The full pahole output is in the Appendix.

sentences.en: nr_frags is at offset 0x02 and frags[0] is at 0x30.
sentences.zh: nr_frags 位于偏移 0x02 处，frags[0] 位于 0x30 处。

sentences.en: The whole skb_shared_info is 320 bytes.
sentences.zh: 整个skb_shared_info是320字节。

sentences.en: The full pahole output is in the Appendix.
sentences.zh: 完整的 Pahole 输出位于附录中。

blocks.html_en: With only 15 bytes we can control little more than a flag. So the only useful field is nr_frags. The frags[0] that will hold the real page descriptor is outside the OOB range. How do we solve this?

sentences.en: With only 15 bytes we can control little more than a flag.
sentences.zh: 只需 15 个字节，我们就只能控制一个标志。

sentences.en: So the only useful field is nr_frags.
sentences.zh: 所以唯一有用的字段是nr_frags。

sentences.en: The frags[0] that will hold the real page descriptor is outside the OOB range.
sentences.zh: 保存实际页面描述符的 frags[0] 超出了 OOB 范围。

sentences.en: How do we solve this?
sentences.zh: 我们如何解决这个问题？

blocks.html_en: Solving the problems below gives root.

sentences.en: Solving the problems below gives root.
sentences.zh: 解决以下问题即可获得root权限。

blocks.html_en: • Write a valid pipe-page descriptor into frags[0]

sentences.en: Write a valid pipe-page descriptor into frags[0]
sentences.zh: 将有效的管道页描述符写入 frags[0]

blocks.html_en: • Turn the freed page into a core_pattern overwrite

sentences.en: Turn the freed page into a core_pattern overwrite
sentences.zh: 将释放的页面变成 core_pattern 覆盖

blocks.html_en: Exploit Details

sentences.en: Exploit Details
sentences.zh: 漏洞利用详情

blocks.html_en: Exploit Summary

sentences.en: Exploit Summary
sentences.zh: 漏洞利用摘要

blocks.html_en: • Reuse Uninitialized Variable → free an object that held a valid skb_frag_t then reallocate it as the vulnerable skb to reuse the uninitialized frags[0]

sentences.en: Reuse Uninitialized Variable → free an object that held a valid skb_frag_t then reallocate it as the vulnerable skb to reuse the uninitialized frags[0]
sentences.zh: 重用未初始化的变量 → 释放持有有效 skb_frag_t 的对象，然后将其重新分配为易受攻击的 skb 以重用未初始化的 frags[0]

blocks.html_en: • Fraggap OOB → flip nr_frags from 0 to 1 so frags[0] is treated as allocated

sentences.en: Fraggap OOB → flip nr_frags from 0 to 1 so frags[0] is treated as allocated
sentences.zh: Fraggap OOB → 将 nr_frags 从 0 翻转为 1，因此 frags[0] 被视为已分配

blocks.html_en: • Append Pipe → attach the second pipe page to slot 1 so nr_frags == 2

sentences.en: Append Pipe → attach the second pipe page to slot 1 so nr_frags == 2
sentences.zh: 附加管道 → 将第二个管道页附加到插槽 1，因此 nr_frags == 2

blocks.html_en: • Unmatched Page Free → the destructor runs put_page() on frags[0]

sentences.en: Unmatched Page Free → the destructor runs put_page() on frags[0]
sentences.zh: 不匹配的页面空闲 → 析构函数在 frags[0] 上运行 put_page()

blocks.html_en: • Dirty Pagetable → reallocate the dangling page as a PTE page

sentences.en: Dirty Pagetable → reallocate the dangling page as a PTE page
sentences.zh: 脏页表 → 将悬挂页重新分配为 PTE 页

blocks.html_en: • Physical write → change the PTE to find and overwrite core_pattern and run a root helper

sentences.en: Physical write → change the PTE to find and overwrite core_pattern and run a root helper
sentences.zh: 物理写入 → 更改 PTE 以查找并覆盖 core_pattern 并运行 root helper

blocks.html_en: Background of the exploit

sentences.en: Background of the exploit
sentences.zh: 漏洞利用的背景

blocks.html_en: Why stale frags[] survives?

sentences.en: Why stale frags[] survives?
sentences.zh: 为什么陈旧的frags[]能够幸存下来？

blocks.html_en: Allocating a new skb head does not clear all of skb_shared_info. __finalize_skb_around() zeroes only up to dataref.

sentences.en: Allocating a new skb head does not clear all of skb_shared_info. __finalize_skb_around() zeroes only up to dataref.
sentences.zh: 分配新的skb头并不会清除所有skb_shared_info。 __finalize_skb_around() 仅将 dataref 归零。

blocks.html_en: frags[] sits after dataref so descriptor bytes from the previous allocation can survive. But nr_frags is reset to 0 so the stale descriptor is normally unreachable. Setting nr_frags to 1 with the Fraggap OOB makes the kernel treat that page as allocated.

sentences.en: frags[] sits after dataref so descriptor bytes from the previous allocation can survive.
sentences.zh: frags[] 位于 dataref 之后，因此先前分配的描述符字节可以保留下来。

sentences.en: But nr_frags is reset to 0 so the stale descriptor is normally unreachable.
sentences.zh: 但 nr_frags 重置为 0，因此过时描述符通常无法访问。

sentences.en: Setting nr_frags to 1 with the Fraggap OOB makes the kernel treat that page as allocated.
sentences.zh: 使用 Fraggap OOB 将 nr_frags 设置为 1 会使内核将该页视为已分配。

blocks.html_en: Dirty Pagetable

sentences.en: Dirty Pagetable
sentences.zh: 脏页表

blocks.html_en: A page table is a 4 KiB page from the page allocator. Overlapping the dangling pipe page with a PTE page lets a pipe write corrupt the PTE. Changing only the PFN of the PTE maps the physical page we want into userspace.

sentences.en: A page table is a 4 KiB page from the page allocator.
sentences.zh: 页表是来自页分配器的 4 KiB 页。

sentences.en: Overlapping the dangling pipe page with a PTE page lets a pipe write corrupt the PTE.
sentences.zh: 将悬空管道页面与 PTE 页面重叠会导致管道写入损坏 PTE。

sentences.en: Changing only the PFN of the PTE maps the physical page we want into userspace.
sentences.zh: 仅更改 PTE 的 PFN 将我们想要的物理页映射到用户空间。

blocks.html_en: Planting a stale frags[0]

sentences.en: Planting a stale frags[0]
sentences.zh: 种植和陈旧碎片[0]

blocks.html_en: For now the only field we control is nr_frags and the frags[0] we need is outside the OOB range. So before triggering the bug the exploit builds a valid descriptor in the same cache and reclaims an object where those bytes remain.

sentences.en: For now the only field we control is nr_frags and the frags[0] we need is outside the OOB range.
sentences.zh: 目前，我们控制的唯一字段是 nr_frags，而我们需要的 frags[0] 超出了 OOB 范围。

sentences.en: So before triggering the bug the exploit builds a valid descriptor in the same cache and reclaims an object where those bytes remain.
sentences.zh: 因此，在触发漏洞之前，漏洞利用程序会在同一缓存中构建有效的描述符，并回收保留这些字节的对象。

blocks.html_en: First it writes a 256-byte marker into the source pipe wp. Then it tee()s into 8 holding pipes to raise the page refcount to 9. These extra references keep the source page alive during grooming and triggering.

sentences.en: First it writes a 256-byte marker into the source pipe wp.
sentences.zh: 首先，它将一个 256 字节标记写入源管道 wp。

sentences.en: Then it tee()s into 8 holding pipes to raise the page refcount to 9.
sentences.zh: 然后它通过 tee() 插入 8 个保持管，将页面引用计数提高到 9。

sentences.en: These extra references keep the source page alive during grooming and triggering.
sentences.zh: 这些额外的引用使源页面在整理和触发期间保持活动状态。

blocks.html_en: The descriptors are built in a single corked datagram. All paged payload comes from the same source page through tee(). So each target head gets a valid descriptor and a valid page reference in frags[0].

sentences.en: The descriptors are built in a single corked datagram.

content_html_zh:
抽象的

Fraggap (CVE-2026-53362) 是 Linux UDPv6 Corking 路径中​​的一个错误，允许将 15 字节 OOB 写入 skb_shared_info。 代码在这里。

漏洞总结

CONFIG_IPV6=y 是必需的。
  1. 两次 splice() 调用会覆盖新 skb 后面的 skb_shared_info 的前 15 个字节。
  2. OOB 写入使堆上剩余的管道地址充当 frags[0]，然后触发 put_page() 创建悬空管道页。
  3. 该页面被回收为 PTE 页面，以便可以读取和写入物理内存。
  4. 它重写 core_pattern 来运行根助手。

错误的会计记录伴随着提交 773ba4fe9104。 当前的 MSG_SPLICE_PAGES 触发器在提交 ce650a166335 后变得可访问。 IPv6 路径已在提交 736b380e28d0 中修复。

漏洞分析

概述

UDP corking 将多个发送收集到一个数据报中。 数据报可以跨越片段边界。 然后 __ip6_append_data() 将前一个 skb 中超出边界的字节计数为 fraggap，并将它们移动到下一个 skb 的线性区域中。 基本的 skb 如下所示。

fraggap 是将复制到线性区域的数据。 因此它必须是新的 skb 线性分配的一部分，并且必须从管道页上剩余的长度中排除。 易受攻击的代码则执行相反的操作。 它从线性数据区域中删除fraggap并将其放入pagedlen中。

内核将碎片间隙字节复制到线性尾部，而不在数据区域中保留空间。 这让我们可以将尾部后面的 skb_shared_info 设置为任意 15 个字节。 仅将单个 nr_frags 字节设置为 1 会使超出范围的 frags[0] 将堆上剩余的管道页地址视为已分配的地址。

根本原因

发生此错误的原因是，根据路径不同，相同字节的计数方式也不同。 构建 datalen 包括 fraggap 作为下一个 skb 必须处理的数据。 相反，分页分支将相同的碎片视为外部数据的一部分。

datalen = length + fraggap;
fraglen = datalen + fragheaderlen;
pagedlen = 0;

/* ... */

else {
    alloclen = fragheaderlen + transhdrlen;
    pagedlen = datalen - transhdrlen;
}

/* ... */

copy = datalen - transhdrlen - fraggap - pagedlen;
if (copy < 0 && !(flags & MSG_SPLICE_PAGES)) {
    err = -EINVAL;
    goto error;
}

datalen 添加了fraggap，但alloclen 没有。 pagedlen 源自 datalen，因此它也包含间隙。 这会将副本缩小为 -fragap。 当 MSG_SPLICE_PAGES 设置时，将跳过负拷贝检查。

之后，代码会忽略 fraggap 是非线性数据并进行真正的线性复制。

data = skb_put(skb, fraglen - pagedlen);
data += fragheaderlen;

if (fraggap) {
    skb->csum = skb_copy_and_csum_bits(
        skb_prev, maxfraglen,
        data + transhdrlen, fraggap);
    /* ... */
}

最后，分页分支复制了间隙内容，但没有为其腾出空间。

触发 15 字节 OOB

目标是使第一个 skb 比片段边界大 15 个字节。 然后下一个 skb 的线性尾部落在 skb_shared_info 的开头。

  1. 具有 320 字节路由标头和 MTU 1287 的 UDPv6 环回套接字
  2. 919 字节的管道有效负载，使第一个 skb 比片段边界大 15 字节
  3. 第二个 20 字节管道有效负载附加到同一个 cork 队列

从管道到套接字的 splice() 使 splice_to_socket() 构建一个 bvec 迭代器并设置 MSG_SPLICE_PAGES。 SPLICE_F_MORE 变为 MSG_MORE。 使用 UDP_CORK，这会将第一个 skb 保留在写入队列中，而不是发送它。

msg.msg_flags = MSG_SPLICE_PAGES;
if (flags & SPLICE_F_MORE)
    msg.msg_flags |= MSG_MORE;

/* ... */

iov_iter_bvec(&msg.msg_iter, ITER_SOURCE, bvec, bc,
               len - remain);
ret = sock_sendmsg(sock, &msg);

调用链为udpv6_sendmsg() → ip6_append_data() → __ip6_append_data() → skb_splice_from_iter()。 使用普通 UDP，因此 udpv6_sendmsg() 选择 ip_generic_getfrag。 __ip6_append_data() 保留页面拼接路径并设置 paged = true。 这到达了将有效负载作为 skb 片段附加的易受攻击的路径。

实际的顺序如下。

  1. 第一个 splice(919, SPLICE_F_MORE) 在添加 8 字节 UDP 标头后附加 length = 927。 320 字节的路由标头使 fragheaderlen 为 360。 第一个 skb 长度恰好变为 1287。
  2. UDP_CORK 将 skb 保留在队列中。 计算出的片段边界为 1272，因此 skb 尾部的最后 15 个字节必须移动到下一个片段。
  3. 第二个 splice(20, SPLICE_F_MORE) 在同一队列中找到尾部 skb。 第一个副本为 0 并且小于新长度 20，因此根据边界重新计算它为 copy = -15。 该值进入alloc_new_skb并创建一个fraggap = 15的新skb。

所需的计算如下。

fragheaderlen = 40 + 320 = 360
maxfraglen    = ((1287 - 360) & ~7) + 360 - 8 = 1272
first skb len = 360 + 8 + 919 = 1287
fraggap       = 1287 - 1272 = 15

second append: length=20, transhdrlen=0
datalen=35, alloclen=360, pagedlen=35, copy=-15

添加 16 字节环回余量和 8 字节片段标头保留使得 alloc_skb() 请求为 384。 在 lts-6.12.85 上，此请求使用 704 字节的 skbuff_small_head 对象。 前384字节是skb数据区，后320字节是skb_shared_info。

skb_put(360) 将尾部精确移动到 skb->end 并且后面的 data += fragheaderlen 指向相同的地址。 因此，前一个 skb 的最后 15 个字节被复制到 skb_shared_info + 0x00 到 +0x0e 中。 这让我们可以将想要的 15 个字节写入 skb_shared_info。

原始的利用

我们现在可以在 skb_shared_info 的开头写入 15 个字节。 第一个 skb 在边界之前保存 1272 - 360 - 8 = 904 个有效负载字节。 因此源有效负载 [904..918] 映射到目标 [+0x00..+0x0e]。

nr_frags 位于 skb_shared_info + 0x02。 因此，该漏洞仅将源字节 906 设置为 1，其余部分设置为 0。

nr_frags 位于偏移 0x02 处，frags[0] 位于 0x30 处。 整个skb_shared_info是320字节。 完整的 Pahole 输出位于附录中。

只需 15 个字节，我们就只能控制一个标志。 所以唯一有用的字段是nr_frags。 保存实际页面描述符的 frags[0] 超出了 OOB 范围。 我们如何解决这个问题？

解决以下问题即可获得root权限。

  • 将有效的管道页描述符写入 frags[0]
  • 将释放的页面变成 core_pattern 覆盖

漏洞利用详情

漏洞利用摘要

  • 重用未初始化的变量 → 释放持有有效 skb_frag_t 的对象，然后将其重新分配为易受攻击的 skb 以重用未初始化的 frags[0]
  • Fraggap OOB → 将 nr_frags 从 0 翻转为 1，因此 frags[0] 被视为已分配
  • 附加管道 → 将第二个管道页附加到插槽 1，因此 nr_frags == 2
  • 不匹配的页面空闲 → 析构函数在 frags[0] 上运行 put_page()
  • 脏页表 → 将悬挂页重新分配为 PTE 页
  • 物理写入 → 更改 PTE 以查找并覆盖 core_pattern 并运行 root helper

漏洞利用的背景

为什么陈旧的frags[]能够幸存下来？

分配新的skb头并不会清除所有skb_shared_info。 __finalize_skb_around() 仅将 dataref 归零。

shinfo = skb_shinfo(skb);
memset(shinfo, 0, offsetof(struct skb_shared_info, dataref));
atomic_set(&shinfo->dataref, 1);

frags[] 位于 dataref 之后，因此先前分配的描述符字节可以保留下来。 但 nr_frags 重置为 0，因此过时描述符通常无法访问。 使用 Fraggap OOB 将 nr_frags 设置为 1 会使内核将该页视为已分配。

脏页表

页表是来自页分配器的 4 KiB 页。 将悬空管道页面与 PTE 页面重叠会导致管道写入损坏 PTE。 仅更改 PTE 的 PFN 将我们想要的物理页映射到用户空间。

种植和陈旧碎片[0]

目前，我们控制的唯一字段是 nr_frags，而我们需要的 frags[0] 超出了 OOB 范围。 因此，在触发漏洞之前，漏洞利用程序会在同一缓存中构建有效的描述符，并回收保留这些字节的对象。

首先，它将一个 256 字节标记写入源管道 wp。 然后它通过 tee() 插入 8 个保持管，将页面引用计数提高到 9。 这些额外的引用使源页面在整理和触发期间保持活动状态。

描述符构建在单个软木塞数据报中。 所有分页负载均通过 tee() 来自同一源页面。 因此每个目标头都会在 frags[0] 中获得一个有效的描述符和一个有效的页面引用。

在关闭新郎插座之前，准备好触发插座和两个管道有效负载。 然后两个拼接运行，中间没有其他分配。 第一个触发器 skb 有一个 392 请求，因此它使用 kmalloc-1k 并且不会触及小头空闲列表。 只有第二个 384 请求重用了刚刚释放的目标之一。

重用的对象现在在 frags[0] 中保存源页面描述符字节，但在 nr_frags == 0 时保持无害。 下一阶段使用 OOB 来激活这个过时的插槽。

从 nr_frags 到悬空页面

一旦 Fraggap OOB 设置 nr_frags = 1，析构函数就会将 frags[0] 视为真正的片段。 第二个拼接将新的 skb 排队。 然后下一个循环迭代将剩余的 20 个有效字节附加到同一个 skb。

skb_append_pagefrags() 使用当前的 nr_frags 作为新描述符的索引。

int i = skb_shinfo(skb)->nr_frags;

if (skb_can_coalesce(skb, i, page, offset)) {
    skb_frag_size_add(&skb_shinfo(skb)->frags[i - 1], size);
} else if (i < max_frags) {
    get_page(page);
    skb_fill_page_desc_noacc(skb, i, page, offset, size);
}

索引已经是1了。 第二个触发管道页面与源 wp 页面不同，因此它不会与 frags[0] 合并并进入 frags[1]。 该路径运行正常的 get_page() 并将 nr_frags 提高到 2。

关闭套接字会刷新 cork 队列，并且 skb 析构函数会释放两个插槽。

for (i = 0; i < shinfo->nr_frags; i++)
    __skb_frag_unref(&shinfo->frags[i], skb->pp_recycle);

因此，frags[0] 上的 put_page() 运行并删除引用计数。 最后关闭管道会留下悬空的页面。

重新获得 PTE 资格

现在有一个 4 KiB 页面返回到分配器，但仍由 wp->pipe_buffer 指向。 调用 mmap() 然后触摸它来创建 PTE 页面会回收已释放的页面。

现在，任何物理页都可以从用户空间读取和写入。

查找并覆盖 core_pattern

通过 PTE 控制的物理读写，我们搜索 core_pattern。

一旦找到它，我们就会更改该值，如下所示。 当子进程引发 SIGSEGV 时，内核以 root 身份运行以下命令。

|/proc/%P/fd/666 %P

该补丁恢复了上述的不变量。 它将真正复制到线性区域的碎片间隙相加，并在非线性区域减去相同的值。

- alloclen = fragheaderlen + transhdrlen;
- pagedlen = datalen - transhdrlen;
+ alloclen = fragheaderlen + transhdrlen + fraggap;
+ pagedlen = datalen - transhdrlen - fraggap;

IPv6 修复还从负副本检查中删除了 MSG_SPLICE_PAGES 异常。 IPv4 路径具有相同的会计错误，并在提交 eca856950f7c 中修复。
